title: CSV-to-JSON Pipeline
prompt:
Write a Hemlock program that processes CSV data into JSON using @stdlib/json and string methods (no csv module needed - parse manually).

1. Define this CSV string (including header row):
"name,age,city,score\nAlice,30,NYC,95\nBob,25,LA,72\nCharlie,35,NYC,88\nDiana,28,Chicago,64\nEve,32,NYC,91\nFrank,27,LA,85"

2. Parse it into an array of objects (split by newlines, then by commas, use first row as keys)
3. Filter to people from "NYC" with score > 80
4. Sort by age ascending
5. Transform each into {name, age, city} (drop score)
6. Print each as: "NAME (AGE) - CITY"
7. Print total count: "total: N"
